entities.name: NYC Founders Club

entities.context: V's company, positioned as tool that upgrades inbound recruiting to referral-like signal

entities.name: Referral-like signal
entities.context: Value proposition for Careerspan - making inbound candidates as high-signal as referrals

entities.name: Inbound recruiting
entities.context: Hiring channel that founders have largely abandoned due to low signal quality

entities.name: Internal recruiters
entities.context: Hiring approach founders default to when skeptical of external tools

entities.name: Referrals
entities.context: Primary trusted hiring method for skeptical founders, but narrows talent pool

relationships.context: Founders default to internal recruiters due to skepticism of recruiting tools
Primary hiring method but limits talent pool and slows hiring
Core positioning - upgrades inbound to match referral quality
Reclaims upside of inbound channel for founders
Target market - founders who have abandoned inbound recruiting
